name: modforge
description: ModForge Discord Security & Moderation Bot - Node.js Migration

scripts.test: node -e "const {ModForge}=require('./bot/bot');(async()=>{const b=new ModForge();await b.loadCogs();for(const c of b.commands.values())c.data.toJSON();console.log('OK commands='+b.commands.size);await b.destroy();process.exit(0)})().catch(e=>{console.error(e);process.exit(1)})"
